frequency: quarterly averages built from monthly series

exchange_rate.title: CLP per USD, average daily rate
exchange_rate.source: OECD Main Economic Indicators via FRED

copper.title: Global price of copper, USD per metric ton
copper.source: IMF Primary Commodity Prices via FRED

transformations: Monthly levels to quarterly averages; natural logs; HP-filter cycles with lambda=1600. Calibration uses AR(1) persistence and innovation std.
warning: Open-economy parameters are illustrative and are not jointly estimated structural coefficients.
